title: 狗狗日常
story: 一隻可愛的狗狗正在享受美好的一天。

idea: 粉筆畫風格的移軸微縮畫面裡，布丁在社區中庭改造成的「柯基考古沙坑」用小短腿拼命刨開竹影翠綠遮棚下的沙土，旁邊一排被牠自己排好的玩具鏟子與生鏽小鐵桶像迷你發掘隊；倫勃朗光從廊柱斜照在牠橘紅白相間的狐狸臉、超大立耳、白色圍脖與搖擺蜜桃屁股上。
story: 布丁堅信自己是大型犬考古隊長，只是腿在探險路上短了一截，所以牠用最快的小短腿挖出一枚「古代餅乾形狀石頭」。孩子們圍在沙坑邊鼓掌時，牠立刻興奮柯基趴，屁股還得意地左右搖，彷彿剛揭開一座失落城市的秘密。

news_inspiration.summary: 巴黎高級訂製時裝週秋冬2026今日登場，30個品牌參與並有多位設計師迎來備受矚目的首秀。
德約科維奇在溫網擊敗薩菲烏林，創下第17次晉級溫網八強與第66次大滿貫八強的新紀錄。
本週科學亮點包括詹姆斯韋伯太空望遠鏡在冥王星與土衛六大氣中偵測到前所未見的神祕物質。
考古學家在埃及西部沙漠發現保存良好的拜占庭時期古城，街道、教堂、工具與錢幣揭開1600年前日常生活面貌。

inspiration: 考古學家在埃及西部沙漠發現保存良好的拜占庭時期古城，街道、教堂、工具與錢幣揭開1600年前日常生活面貌。
title: 短腿考古隊
prompt: Chalk art illustration on a dark green blackboard slate: a tilt-shift miniature scene of Pudding, a literal four-legged red-and-white Pembroke Welsh Corgi, frantically digging sand with very short sturdy legs inside a community courtyard “Corgi Archaeology Sandpit” under a jade-green bamboo-shadow canopy. Pudding has a long loaf-shaped body, warm orange-red #D98243 and white coat, white collar ruff, white chest and belly, four white socks, a thin white blaze up the nose bridge, oversized upright triangular ears, big round bright brown #6B4423 eyes, happy cheeky corgi grin, no collar, no accessories, no tail or only a tiny stub, and a round peach-shaped rump wiggling proudly in a corgi sploot pose. In the sand before the dog is an unearthed ancient cookie-shaped stone; beside the sandpit is a neat row of toy shovels and rusted small iron buckets with oxidized patina, peeling paint, warm orange-brown corrosion, like a tiny excavation team. Children stand blurred around the sandpit edge clapping in the background, never replacing the dog. Composition: miniature toy-like courtyard diorama, selective focus band across Pudding and the cookie stone, blurred foreground and background, high-angle tilt-shift view. Lighting: Rembrandt lighting from a single 45-degree beam through corridor columns, dramatic chiaroscuro, signature triangle of light on the shadowed cheek, warm highlights on the fox-like orange-white face, upright ears, white ruff, and peach rump. Color and technique: dusty matte colored chalk texture, visible hatching strokes, saturated emerald, malachite, bamboo jade-green tones with warm rust accents on dark green slate. Visually display the exact text “2026-07-06 08:35 UTC” in clear white chalk on a small blackboard sign at the sandpit edge. Negative constraints: no tricolor corgi, no black saddle marking, no long legs, no tall dog, no normal leg proportions, no long fluffy tail, no floppy ears, no blue eyes, no cardigan corgi tail, no thin body, no collar, no bandana, no clothing, no leash, no anthropomorphic dog, no dog with human body or human hands, no dog standing upright, no humanoid dog, no mascot costume, no dog with human face. IMPORTANT: any text rendered in the image (date/time, title, signs, captions) must use Traditional Chinese (繁體中文 / 正體字) glyphs or English only. NEVER render Simplified Chinese (简体字).

title: 靛夜路線
story: 今天家人想臨時改走河堤，麻吉立刻在便當店門口定格成雕像，前爪死死壓著原本的巷弄路線。店老闆偷偷放下一小塊雞肉，麻吉只把下巴靠上桌沿盯了三秒，然後假裝不是因為開心才原地轉了一圈。
prompt: Opaque gouache painting with matte finish, bold flat colors and illustrative texture. Eye-level frontal composition, straight-on symmetrical view of a moonlit indigo old bento shop entrance at night. A compact literal red Shiba Inu named Machi sits squarely on all fours at the wooden threshold facing the camera, bright russet-red #C96F33 coat, clean cream urajiro #FFF6E8 cheeks, chin, chest, belly and inner legs, two round fluffy white mochi-like cheek tufts, upright triangular ears with cream inner fur, tightly curled tail over the back forming a perfect ring, round dark brown #4A3220 eyes, tiny light eyebrow dots, smug squinting shiba smile. Machi stubbornly presses one front paw onto a small wind-rumpled walking route map on the ground, clearly protecting the original alley route. Warm high-key bright light spills from inside the bento shop, airy overexposed feel, soft even illumination, minimal shadows, luminous clean atmosphere. Bento steam drifts through the doorway; gold foil flecks, scattered metallic gold leaf shards and hand-applied gilded splatter sparkle along the shop sign edges and steam. Moonlit indigo palette with deep night-blue and violet tones, cool silvery highlights, dreamy pastel mood, dark blue dominance with luxurious shimmering accents. The dog’s cream mochi cheeks, cream chest, small eyebrow dots, curled tail and paw-on-map action are the focal point. A small shop wall clock or neat sign beside the door must visibly display the English text: "2026-07-06 09:35 UTC". No collar, no accessories, no leash, no clothing, no humans as main subject, no anthropomorphic features, no human hands, no black-and-tan shiba, no cream-only shiba, no white shiba, no floppy ears, no straight or drooping tail, no blue eyes, no husky markings, no corgi body. IMPORTANT: any text rendered in the image (date/time, title, signs, captions) must use Traditional Chinese (繁體中文 / 正體字) glyphs or English only. NEVER render Simplified Chinese (简体字).
idea: 不透明水彩畫風，平視正面構圖：月夜靛藍的老便當店門口，赤柴犬麻吉端坐在木門檻前，用一隻前爪固執地壓住被風吹亂的散步路線小地圖，尾巴捲成完美圈圈，瞇眼微笑裡帶著「本柴早就安排好」的傲嬌。高調明亮光從店內灑出，便當蒸氣與招牌邊緣散落金箔潑點，牠白色麻糬臉頰、奶油白胸口與小眉毛斑清楚成為畫面焦點。

story: 秀前最後三分鐘，裁縫師發現腰封缺了一段淡金緞帶，靈緹犬卻早已從散落的布料堆裡嗅出正確那捲。牠穿梭在低垂裙襬與高跟鞋之間，把緞帶推到鏡前，讓自拍中的混亂瞬間像一場即興高訂儀式。

title: 橙繩星犬
story: 訓練員原本只讓牠辨認工具氣味，牠卻先發現一枚鬆脫的微型螺栓正飄進水下模型的陰影。機械臂停在半空，搜救犬拖著繩索繞過艙架，像替一顆老望遠鏡找回回家的路。
inspiration: NASA 發射新型太空維修任務，準備用機械臂替老化的 Swift 太空望遠鏡升軌續命，可能開啟非對接衛星救援的新模式。
idea: 像素藝術全身居中直幅，一隻陶瓷質感的搜救犬在 NASA 中性浮力實驗室水下艙段裡，咬著螢橙色定位繩游向正在演練修復 Swift 太空望遠鏡的機械臂；青橙電影調燈光穿過氣泡與金屬艙壁。

中國新創正加速研發靈巧機器手，從人形機器人到低價義肢都可能因此更接近實用化。

story: 小嗚本來只是聞到球上有草地味，下一秒就認定那顆球會自己逃跑。牠一邊用全身煞車一邊發出長篇辯解，彷彿在告訴通道裡的球員與機器人：我沒有搗亂，是這顆球先挑釁我。

story: 考古隊原本以為那只是普通碎陶，直到獵犬停下嗅聞，把鼻尖貼近一段半埋的街角石縫。牠沒有叼起任何東西，只是一再用爪尖推開沙粒，像替一座沉睡一千六百年的城指出回家的門。
prompt: Art Deco inspired photograph. A shallow depth-of-field close-up, intimate near-object framing, featuring a graceful sand-colored sighthound. The sighthound is the sharp subject against a creamy blurred background, its front paw delicately nudging fine desert sand away from ancient pottery fragments. This tactile scene unfolds on a geometric patterned surface, hinting at a luxurious gold and black aesthetic, inside a temporary protective shelter made of frosted glass, showcasing a translucent matte surface and diffused light transmission at a Byzantine ancient city excavation site in the Egyptian Western Desert. Outside the shelter, a blizzard-like sandstorm rages, creating a snowstorm atmospheric lighting effect. Visibility is obscured by heavy falling sand, veiling the fogged distance in cold blue-white hues. Through the frosted glass, high saturation peacock blue, coral red, and emerald green archaeological markers appear as soft, blurred, vivid shapes, creating eye-catching contrast and an energetic color feel. Muted diffused daylight within the shelter emphasizes tactile details of the dog's fur and the ancient ceramic fragments. The scene embodies 1920s elegance and luxurious symmetry in its design elements. The date and time '2026年7月6日 15:35 UTC' are visually displayed. Shot with a 35mm lens, f/1.8, using natural light, a candid shot emphasizing soft bokeh and fine grain. IMPORTANT: any text rendered in the image (date/time, title, signs, captions) must use Traditional Chinese (繁體中文 / 正體字) glyphs or English only. NEVER render Simplified Chinese (简体字).

idea: 歐普藝術風格的頭肩特寫：拿鐵坐在由鏽蝕老電車改裝的月夜靛藍下午茶咖啡廳窗邊，杏紅色泰迪捲毛被窗邊柔光勾出圓蓬輪廓，正用前爪輕拍蕾絲坐墊上的小水滴，要求換一顆更軟的枕頭。背景的鐵鏽窗框與靛藍黑白視錯波紋交錯，讓牠像一朵不肯沾濕的拿鐵拉花。
prompt: Op Art illustrated head-and-shoulders portrait of Latte, a literal small toy poodle sitting on all fours beside the window of a moonlit indigo afternoon-tea cafe built inside a rusted old tram. Latte has an even apricot-red #C98B5E coat of soft tight curls, signature round teddy-bear groom with extra-fluffy round head and rounded muzzle, floppy ears hidden in curls, small round black button nose, round dark-brown #4A3220 button eyes, tiny pink tongue peeking out, sweet bright slightly prideful expression; no collar, no bows, no clothing. Tight classic portrait composition, face filling the frame, intimate eye-level connection. The dog gently taps a tiny water droplet on a lace cushion with one front paw, looking upward with dignified complaint as if requesting a softer pillow. On the lace cushion beside the droplet, clearly readable embroidered text in English: "2026-07-06 16:35 UTC". Background: oxidized rusted tram window frame, peeling paint, warm orange-brown corrosion, intersecting indigo, black, and white optical illusion wave patterns with high-contrast repetition, abstract geometric Op Art vibration and movement, making Latte resemble a latte-art foam flower refusing to get wet. Lighting: soft directional daylight from a side window, gentle Vermeer-like illumination, smooth falloff into shadow, cool silvery moonlit highlights, deep night-blue and violet dominance with warm rust accents. Artistic medium: polished editorial gouache and ink illustration with clean graphic Op Art patterning, crisp shapes, delicate lace texture, expressive portrait detail. Negative constraints: no white poodle, no black poodle, no grey poodle, no show cut, no shaved muzzle, no pompom tail cut, no straight silky fur, no large standard poodle, no upright ears, no blue eyes, no bows, no ribbons, no collar, no dress, no clothing, no leash, no anthropomorphic dog, no human body, no human hands, no standing upright like a person, no humanoid dog, no furry character, no mascot costume, no human face. IMPORTANT: any text rendered in the image (date/time, title, signs, captions) must use Traditional Chinese (繁體中文 / 正體字) glyphs or English only. NEVER render Simplified Chinese (简体字).

title: 靛窗小公主
story: 拿鐵剛從美容院吹完毛，驕傲地坐上牠指定的窗邊座位，卻發現枕頭邊緣有一滴雨水。牠立刻抬頭挺胸，粉色小舌頭微露，用深棕圓眼哀怨地看著服務生，直到新的軟枕被送來才恢復公主姿態。
